claudeResult.resultText: The dashboard rendered — a line chart of error-rate-per-minute (state path `/errorRate`) plus a DataTable of the 3 recent log lines (state path `/logs`). Both are bound via `$state`, so future updates can append to `/errorRate` or `/logs` directly (e.g. via `canvas_patch` or `canvas_live`). Open http://localhost:7813/?session=063d788d-21bd-4b63-8f4a-fb3362bf3dee to view it — I couldn't grab a snapshot since no canvas tab is connected yet.
